name: Complete Chicken Dinner in a Pot
recipeIngredient: 6 to 8 carrots, cut into half crosswise and then lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken inside and out, then dry it thoroughly.
2. Loosen the skin from the breast, legs, and thighs areas.
3. Peel the garlic and slice it in half.
4. Place 8 pieces of garlic between the breast skin and meat and 4 pieces between the legs and thighs, as well as the skin.
5. Place the chicken in a covered roasting pan.
6. Lay rosemary sprigs on top of the breast (one sprig on each side).
7. Cut carrots into half crosswise and then lengthwise, and place them around the chicken.
8. Cut potatoes into quarters and place them in the pan.
9. Cover the roaster and bake for 2 hours at 275 degrees Fahrenheit or until tender and juices run clear when pricked with a fork.
10. When done, discard the skin and save the garlic to use with leftover chicken for chicken salad. Bone the chicken before serving if desired. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
